summary: Comprehensive testing of FinTrack Pro accounting application completed. Backend APIs are 100% functional with all CRUD operations working. Frontend UI successfully implements multi-company finance management for Tres Teknoloji A.Ş. and Netlen İnternet Hizmetleri Ltd. Şti. with Turkish localization.

ui_bugs.issue: Dialog overlay occasionally blocks navigation clicks when forms are open
ui_bugs.workaround: Close modal before navigation or use ESC key

passed_tests: Company creation (Netlen İnternet Hizmetleri Ltd. Şti.)
Personnel management (John Doe added with 25,000 TRY salary)
Payment reminders (Monthly Office Rent with 8,000 TRY)
Navigation between all pages (Dashboard, Companies, Incomes, Expenses, Personnel, Reminders)
Backend API - Personnel and salary management
